column2: # Step 1: Separate the data into two groups (Production and Comprehension)
# Step 2: Set consistent y-axis limits and ticks
y_breaks <- seq(0, 0.5, by = 0.05)  # Set y-axis ticks at 0.1 intervals
# Step 3: Create the line plot for Production and Comprehension
plot_prod_comp <- ggplot(prod_comp_data, aes(x = eng_level, y = avg_percentage, color = condition)) +
facet_grid(. ~ event_type, scales = "free", space = "free") +  # Use facet_grid to allow right axis labels
scale_y_continuous(limits = y_limits, breaks = y_breaks, sec.axis = dup_axis(name = NULL)) +  # Consistent y-axis limits and ticks
panel.spacing = unit(1, "lines"))+  # Adjust space between panels
